Thank you for playing "Elly: The Village's Shared Wife Trial Version"!
Thank you for purchasing "Elly: The Village's Shared Wife Full Version"!

\SE[1]Here are the controls! They're also written in the README inside the game folder, so
you can check there too!
移動 skit キャラ名 ウェイト 位置 スピード 相対指定 イージング
skit moveOut マナ t def left

parameters.text:
Enter key / Left-click hold：Fast-forward event
Ctrl：Message skip
A：Auto-advance message
Right-click, Shift：Hide message window
Tab：Display backlog

parameters: 表示文字列 = 決定キー、左クリックの長押し：イベントの早送り…

skit slideIn マナ t center

\SE[5]Next, let's set up the character voices! In this game, moans and other sounds are
played as BGS or SE, so if you don't want them, please set them to OFF here!
Character voices have been turned ON.
Character voices have been turned OFF.

\SE[default]After starting the game, you can adjust the voice volume from the options in the menu
screen to set the volume ON/OFF again!

\SE[6]\SM[double]Finally... tell me your name! The name of the hero of this story, Elly-chan's big
brother... and the boy I love so much!

\SE[1]You can also change your name by selecting "Change Protagonist Name" in the "Special
Settings"!

\SE[default]Oh, and \n[1]! Should we skip the opening part and just give a quick explanation? Or do
you want to watch it properly?
\SE[5]...Yeah! Well then, \n[1]...! This is where we part ways!

You're going back now... to your sister Elly-chan... back to our hometown village
where we were born and raised!
\SE[6]See you later, \n[1]~! Have fun on your long-awaited homecoming~!
完了までウェイト = true
skit loop マナ t clear
\SE[4]O-okay...! Well then, I'll give you a quick rundown...!

\SE[1]You are \n[1]! A boy who dreamed of being an adventurer and set off for the Royal City
with me! You were living busy days, immersed in adventure every day...

\SE[2]\SM[pop3]But then, I fell ill... and while I was receiving treatment, with nothing else to do,
you decided to return to your hometown village for the first time in a year...

\SE[3]\SM[tremble]Somehow... your sister Elly-chan... seems to be angry with you!? Wh-why!? You two
were such close siblings...! What in the world happened, Elly-chan~!

\SE[1]...That's about how it was, I think, yeah! Well then, \n[1]! Do your best to make up
with Elly-chan~!
オープニング飛ばし状態を作って飛ばす
完了までウェイト = true
skit loop マナ t clear
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = OP_EVENT_06
\SE[1]Yeah, got it... well then, \n[1]! Here, this is from my little secret stash!
\SE[default]Take this and try going to Dario's house! Well then... goodbye! \n[1]!
